serverInfo.name: System Report
serverInfo.description: Tech news, analysis, and client-side privacy tools. All APIs are public and read-only.

tools.name: search-articles
tools.description: Search published tech news articles by keyword. Returns titles, URLs, dates, tags, and descriptions.

query.description: Search term or phrase to find matching articles

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 10)

tools.name: get-latest-articles
tools.description: Retrieve the latest published articles with metadata including title, URL, date, tags, hero image, and audio narration link.

limit.description: Maximum number of articles to return (default 20)

tools.name: strip-exif-metadata
tools.description: Remove EXIF metadata (GPS, camera model, timestamps) from JPEG, PNG, and WebP images. Runs 100% client-side in the browser — images never leave the user's device.

action.description: Navigate to the EXIF tool page to use interactively

resources.name: articles-json
resources.description: Full index of all published articles in JSON format

resources.name: articles-ndjson
resources.description: Streaming NDJSON feed of all articles (one JSON object per line)

resources.name: rss-feed
resources.description: RSS 2.0 feed with full article content, images, and categories

resources.name: json-feed
resources.description: JSON Feed 1.1 with article summaries and metadata

resources.name: podcast-feed
resources.description: Podcast RSS feed with audio narrations of articles

resources.name: llms-context
resources.description: LLM-optimized site overview with navigation and API links
